title: Fletched Arrows (bow resprite)
description: Adds feathers on arrows in bow pulling textures and offers alternative styles of bows
body:
This pack changes bow pulling textures to have visible feathers on arrows and offers alternative bow styles.

## Bow Pulling
![POV of pulling a bow](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/86795fb517272777d7f736082efee1375d8f57e3.jpeg)

## Alternative Styles:
All alternative (2-4) styles are labelled as different files, see versions tab
## Style 1 (default)
![style 1 (default)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/55f3794274f437937c72b1f90f130f94e9bef6e3.png)
